---
title: "Figure 2"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r}

filenames=c(
  "data/figure_2_dlikelihood_analysis_MRV",
  "data/figure_2_dlikelihood_analysis_IRV"
)

algorithms=c("MRV"
             ,"IRV"
             )

schemes=c("scheme_CO","scheme_CO")
```


```{r}

d=data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(filenames)){
  
  d0=read.csv(paste0(filenames[i],".csv"))
  d0$algo=algorithms[i]
  d0$scheme=schemes[i]
  
  d=rbind(d,d0)
}
d<- d %>%
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.))))
```

```{r}
d%>%select(component_path)%>%distinct()%>%pull()

```


```{r}
d<-d%>%mutate(component= component_path %>%
           str_replace("^Probit_statistics_Moment_statistics.*\\.", "") %>%
           str_replace("^Probit_statistics_Sum_Moment_statistics.*\\.", "Sum_")%>%
           str_replace("^Probit_statistics_", "")%>%
           str_replace("^Evolution.*\\.Moment_statistics_", "Evolution_")%>%
          str_replace("^Evolution.*\\.", "Evolution_"))
   
     
```

```{r}
d%>%select(component)%>%distinct()%>%pull()

```
```{r}
d%>%filter(component%in%c("covariance_Sum_dlogL", "Sum_covariance_dlogL"))%>%select(component,value_row,value_col,probit,calculus, quantile_level, param_name, value,algo,scheme)%>%arrange(component,value_row,value_col,algo,quantile_level)
```

```{r}
ds<-read.csv("data/figure_2_simulation.csv")%>%
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.))))
```


```{r}
dc<-ds%>%group_by(n_step,step_start,step_middle,step_end,agonist)%>%summarise(y_observed=mean(patch_current))
```
```{r}
df<-d%>%left_join(dc, by=join_by(sample_index==n_step))
```



```{r}
d_DIB_evol<-
  df%>%filter(component=="Evolution_Distortion_Induced_Bias")%>%select(param_name,algo,sample_index,probit,quantile_level,value)%>%pivot_wider(names_from = c(probit,quantile_level), values_from = value)

```
```{r}
d_DIB_evol%>%ggplot()+geom_line(aes(x=sample_index,y=mean_NA))+geom_errorbar(aes(x=sample_index,ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975))+facet_wrap(param_name~algo, scales="free")

```

```{r}
d_gradient_evol<-
  df%>%filter(component=="Evolution_dlogL_true", statistic=="mean")%>%select(param_name,algo,sample_index,probit,quantile_level,value)%>%pivot_wider(names_from = c(probit,quantile_level), values_from = value)

```
```{r}
d_gradient_evol%>%ggplot()+geom_line(aes(x=sample_index,y=mean_NA))+geom_errorbar(aes(x=sample_index,ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975))+facet_wrap(param_name~algo, scales="free")

```
